use_case_name: Retrieve list of available certificates from a Charging Station

structured.name: Retrieve list of available certificates from a Charging Station
structured.objective: To enable the CSMS to retrieve a list of available certificates from a Charging Station.
structured.description:
To facilitate the management of the Charging Station’s installed certificates, a method of
retrieving the installed certificates is provided. The CSMS requests the Charging Station to send a
list of installed certificates
scenario:
1. The CSMS requests the Charging Station to send a list of installed certificates by sending a
GetInstalledCertificateIdsRequest
2. The Charging Station responds with a GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse
structured.postconditions: The CSMS received a list of installed certificates
structured.remarks:
For installing the (V2G) Charging Station Certificate, see use cases A02 - Update Charging Station
Certificate by request of CSMS and A03 - Update Charging Station Certificate initiated by the
Charging Station. The V2G certificate chain SHOULD NOT include the V2GRootCertificate. This
SHOULD be installed using Use case M05 - Install CA certificate in a Charging Station.

requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with a
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse.

requirements.precondition:
M03.FR.01 AND
No certificate matching certificateType was
found
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL indicate this by setting status in the
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse to NotFound.

requirements.precondition:
M03.FR.01 AND
A certificate matching certificateType was found
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL indicate this by setting status in the
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse to Accepted.

The Charging Station SHALL include the hash data for each
matching installed certificate in the
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
GetInstalledCertificateIdsRequest with
certificateType V2GCertificateChain
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL include the hash data for each
installed certificate belonging to a V2G certificate chain. Sub CA
certificates SHALL be placed as a childCertificate under the V2G
Charging Station certificate.

chunks.content:
# M03 - Retrieve list of available certificates from a Charging Station

**Objective:** To enable the CSMS to retrieve a list of available certificates from a Charging Station.

**Description:** To facilitate the management of the Charging Station’s installed certificates, a method of
retrieving the installed certificates is provided. The CSMS requests the Charging Station to send a
list of installed certificates

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The CSMS requests the Charging Station to send a list of installed certificates by sending a
GetInstalledCertificateIdsRequest
2. The Charging Station responds with a GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse

**Prerequisites:** n/a

**Postconditions:** The CSMS received a list of installed certificates

**Remarks:** For installing the (V2G) Charging Station Certificate, see use cases A02 - Update Charging Station
Certificate by request of CSMS and A03 - Update Charging Station Certificate initiated by the
Charging Station. The V2G certificate chain SHOULD NOT include the V2GRootCertificate. This
SHOULD be installed using Use case M05 - Install CA certificate in a Charging Station.

metadata.heading: M03 - Retrieve list of available certificates from a Charging Station
metadata.use_case_name: Retrieve list of available certificates from a Charging Station

chunks.content:
# M03 - Requirements

**M03.FR.01**
Precondition: After receiving a
GetInstalledCertificateIdsRequest
The Charging Station SHALL respond with a
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse.

**M03.FR.02**
Precondition: M03.FR.01 AND
No certificate matching certificateType was
found
The Charging Station SHALL indicate this by setting status in the
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse to NotFound.

**M03.FR.03**
Precondition: M03.FR.01 AND
A certificate matching certificateType was found
The Charging Station SHALL indicate this by setting status in the
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse to Accepted.

**M03.FR.04**
Precondition: M03.FR.03
The Charging Station SHALL include the hash data for each
matching installed certificate in the
GetInstalledCertificateIdsResponse.

**M03.FR.05**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
GetInstalledCertificateIdsRequest with
certificateType V2GCertificateChain
The Charging Station SHALL include the hash data for each
installed certificate belonging to a V2G certificate chain. Sub CA
certificates SHALL be placed as a childCertificate under the V2G
Charging Station certificate.

metadata.heading: M03 - Requirements
metadata.use_case_name: Retrieve list of available certificates from a Charging Station
